Блок1-04 Дом с бассейном.scriptText:
Бассейн на своём участке — это не про миллионеров. Это про торги.

Здесь была только земля — купленная дешевле рынка.

Дом растёт: каркас, стены, панорамные окна.

Рядом появляется чаша бассейна.

Террасы, шезлонги, подсветка, зелень — участок оживает.

Лето, которое не кончается. Торги Земли.
Блок1-04 Дом с бассейном.whiskPrompts:
Empty flat green land plot with a surveyor marker peg, low drone three-quarter angle at golden hour, this is the FUTURE SITE — NO building yet, quiet modern low-rise cottage neighborhood with stone and timber houses behind, gentle green hills and light airy forest on the horizon, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
The SAME single-story modern house from the SAME low drone three-quarter angle: THREE connected flat-roofed volumes — a left wing, a central slightly raised clerestory section with a horizontal window strip reached by a few timber steps, and a right wing, ALL with STRICTLY FLAT parapet roofs, facades of white render with warm vertical timber cladding accents, full-height black-framed panoramic sliding windows, a wide wooden terrace deck wrapping the front, directly in front of the terrace exactly ONE single RECTANGULAR swimming pool (NO second pool, NO extra pool) with light-blue mosaic and corner entry steps in identical size and position, the same low-rise cottage neighborhood and hills behind — shown at an EARLY CONSTRUCTION stage: only the timber structural frame and first white walls are up, the roof is a flat parapet frame with flat ceiling joists (NO pitched roof, NO hip roof, NO gable, NO sloped roof, NO triangular trusses), the pool is just an empty excavated concrete pit with NO water, bare soil around, NO landscaping yet, building materials stacked neatly, golden hour, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
The EXACT SAME single-story modern house from the SAME angle — THREE connected flat-roofed volumes (left wing, central raised clerestory section with timber steps, right wing), STRICTLY FLAT parapet roofs, white render and warm vertical timber cladding, full-height black-framed panoramic windows, wide wooden terrace deck, the SAME single RECTANGULAR pool in the SAME position (exactly ONE pool, NO second pool) — now STRUCTURALLY COMPLETE with finished facades and all glazing installed, the pool shell is being tiled with light-blue mosaic and is still EMPTY of water, two workers finishing the mosaic, bare soil around, NO landscaping yet, golden hour, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
The EXACT SAME single-story modern house from the SAME angle — THREE connected flat-roofed volumes, STRICTLY FLAT parapet roofs, white render and warm timber cladding, full-height black-framed panoramic windows, wide wooden terrace deck, the SAME single RECTANGULAR pool in the SAME position (exactly ONE pool, NO second pool) — fully finished, the pool is now filled with calm still clear water, the pool is simply FULL of water, NO waterfall, NO fountain, NO water jets, NO water spraying or trickling from any side or corner, NO water features on or beside the deck, the ONLY water is the still water inside the pool, bare soil still around with minimal landscaping, golden hour, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
The EXACT SAME single-story modern house from the SAME angle — THREE connected flat-roofed volumes, STRICTLY FLAT parapet roofs, white render and warm timber cladding, full-height black-framed panoramic windows, wide wooden terrace deck, the SAME RECTANGULAR pool full of calm clear water in the SAME position — now with COMPLETE landscaping: fresh green lawn, wooden and stone pathways, young trees and ornamental shrubs with warm garden uplighting, sun loungers on the deck by the pool, warm afternoon light, NO water jets or fountains anywhere, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
The EXACT SAME single-story modern house from the SAME angle — THREE connected flat-roofed volumes, STRICTLY FLAT parapet roofs, white render and warm timber cladding, full-height black-framed panoramic windows, wide wooden terrace deck, the SAME single RECTANGULAR pool in the SAME position (exactly ONE pool, NO second pool), the SAME COMPLETE landscaping as the previous frame (same lawn, same trees, same shrubs, same uplighting, NOTHING about the house or garden changes) — in the evening, warm light glowing in the panoramic windows, the pool glowing with calm underwater lighting, a Slavic European family with light skin relaxing on the sun loungers by the pool, dusk, NO water jets or fountains, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
Блок1-04 Дом с бассейном.videoPrompts:
Slow steady aerial push-in over the empty plot, grass sways gently, fixed locked-off tripod camera, absolutely steady, NO camera shake, NO handheld wobble, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Almost still living-photo of the single-story house at its early frame stage: the house holds EXACTLY its current shape and its SINGLE-STORY height throughout — this is ONE story only, the house NEVER grows taller, NEVER gains a second floor, NEVER adds an upper story or extra level, the roof stays a clean flat single-story parapet (NO pitched, NO hip, NO gable at any moment), only very subtle finishing details settle and the golden light shifts gently, the pool in the foreground stays exactly ONE single empty concrete pit with NO water for the whole shot — NO second basin, NO jacuzzi, NO spa, NO extra pool, the ground stays bare with NO landscaping appearing, fixed locked-off tripod camera, absolutely steady, NO camera shake, NO handheld wobble, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Almost still living-photo: the empty pool shell sits beside the finished single-story house, only faint light shift and a worker's subtle motion, the house stays identical and rigid and SINGLE-STORY — NEVER gains a second floor, the pool stays exactly ONE single empty basin — NO second basin, NO jacuzzi, NO spa, NO extra pool, fixed locked-off tripod camera, absolutely steady, NO camera shake, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Seamless time-lapse: the water level inside the pool rises evenly from the bottom until full, the water comes up from within the pool itself, NO waterfall, NO fountain, NO water jets, NO water spraying from any side, house and pool stay identical and rigid, fixed locked-off tripod camera, absolutely steady, NO camera shake, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Seamless time-lapse: lawn, pathways, trees, shrubs, uplighting and sun loungers appear around the same pool, the house stays identical and rigid, fixed locked-off tripod camera, absolutely steady, NO camera shake, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Evening: window and pool lights switch on, the family relaxes on the loungers, the house and garden stay identical to the previous frame, camera slowly and steadily rises, fixed smooth motion, NO camera shake, NO handheld wobble, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
